name: FIBROUS NODULE OF BREAST
definition: FIBROUS DISEASE OF THE BREAST = FIBROUS DISEASE = FOCAL FIBROSIS OF THE BREAST =

demographics.Frequency: 3-4% of benign masses; 8% of surgical breast specimens
demographics.Histo: focally dense collagenous stroma surrounding atrophic epithelium; NONSPECIFIC

discriminating_features: suggestive of malignancy (11%): irregular shape, spiculated margin, posterior acoustic

general: suggestive of malignancy (11%): irregular shape, spiculated margin, posterior acoustic
